chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No. D-2452 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on CMA No.13947 of 2025 (Urgency) 2. For orders on office objection No.1 to 8. 3. For orders on CMA No.11595 of 2025 (Exemption) 4. For orders on CMA No.11596 of 2025 (Stay) 5. For hearing of main case. 14.07.2025 None present for the Petitioner. --------------------- None is present on behalf of the petitioner, and no intimation has been received. The same was the position on the last date of hearing, i.e., 08.07.2025. It is observed that during the Summer Vacation, this is the second urgent application filed, and on both dates of hearing, neither the petitioner nor counsel appeared. In the circumstances, the urgent application is dismissed with costs of Rs.10,000/- [Rupees Ten Thousand only], to be paid by the petitioner and deposited in the account of the High Court Clinic. JUDGE JUDGE Jamil
